notes: Plays perfectly with no issues.  Finished the game.  There is only a warning popup about fullscreen mode but it is in error, after hitting enter or clicking "ok" dismissing the warning the game continues in fullscreen (letterboxed) mode. Since it only requires dismissing an irrelevant warning I give it a Platinum.
title: Scratches - Director's Cut
